personal.preferred_title: Senior AI Data Platform Engineer | Python, PySpark, RAG, Enterprise Data Platforms

summary: Senior Data Engineer and AI data platform practitioner with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience across financial services, performance engineering, cloud data platforms, and automation. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark/Spark, Pandas, Parquet, AWS data services, production data pipelines, telemetry analytics, and ML forecasting workflows. Built RAG-style and agentic AI workflow projects using FAISS, sentence-transformers, LLM APIs, JSON contracts, quality gates, and automation orchestration. Currently extending AWS/PySpark experience toward modern AI data platform patterns including lakehouse storage, vector retrieval, REST/API services, MCP-enabled workflows, and cloud AI platform adoption.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and supported Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, converting infrastructure and monitoring feeds into governed datasets for forecasting, reporting, and operational analytics.
Built AWS-based data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and cloud-oriented pipeline patterns to modernize on-premise data processing and forecasting workloads.
Developed ML forecasting workflows with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks months ahead, connecting curated data assets to analytics and AI/ML decision-support use cases.
Designed optimized Oracle and Redshift-backed data structures for historical telemetry retention, SQL analysis, schema design, and repeatable reporting across regulated banking infrastructure.
Integrated data feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines with validation, reconciliation, monitoring, and root-cause investigation practices.
Created stakeholder-facing dashboards and reporting tools using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, SQL, and curated datasets to expose capacity, reliability, and risk insights.
Built GenAI/Text-to-SQL and agentic workflow prototypes using Claude, LLM APIs, structured prompts, JSON artifacts, and quality gates to explore practical AI access to enterprise data.
Documented technical designs, operational flows, data definitions, and troubleshooting procedures for production support, knowledge sharing, and cross-team adoption.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems and transformed real-user and synthetic telemetry into actionable engineering analytics.
Led the FAST project, data-mining performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-critical digital systems.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, improving observability and operational understanding of distributed application behavior.
Partnered with engineering teams during AWS migration planning, providing performance, monitoring, and operational-readiness input for cloud transition decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting enterprise-scale telemetry and reliability operations.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and management modules to standardize monitoring, analysis, and issue-resolution workflows across customer environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate weekly performance reporting, replacing manual exports with repeatable data processing routines.
Collaborated with J2EE, WebLogic, database, and operations teams to troubleshoot bottlenecks, analyze telemetry, and document root-cause findings for production systems.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and sub-second query behavior.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing routines to verify migration accuracy across high-volume transactional datasets.
Optimized database access patterns and transaction processing logic, reducing hardware footprint while maintaining performance for mission-critical workloads.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic workflow system using Python, semantic duplicate detection, vector embeddings, LLM-powered scoring, JSON artifacts, quality gates, and automated resume/cover generation.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Bedrock to support analytics, lakehouse-style storage, and AI data access use cases.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark-oriented forecasting platform for banking-scale telemetry, turning raw infrastructure data into curated forecasting datasets and decision-support dashboards.
